CurrentIssues.ID: CyclomaticComplexMethod:SafeApiCall.kt$suspend inline fun <reified T> safeApiCall( isIdempotent: Boolean = false, crossinline call: suspend () -> HttpResponse ): Either<DataError.Network, T>
